name: M7 Assault Rifle
effect: Reliable, versatile, standard-issue. Baseline weapon — every Terran soldier can field-strip one blindfolded. Starting equipped on all 6 Shock-Marines.

name: Breacher Shotgun
effect: Close-range devastation. +15% damage, −20% range. Forces enemies to commit to short-range engagements.

name: Plasma Pistol
effect: High energy, rapid discharge. +10% damage, +5% attack speed. Lightweight sidearm that exceeds its class.

name: Standard Composite
effect: Mass-produced armor plating. Baseline protection — ships standard on all Terran infantry. Starting equipped on all 6 Shock-Marines.

name: Reactive Plating
effect: Explosive micro-charges on impact face detonate incoming projectiles. +20% HP. Starting inventory: 1 loose unit (unequipped).

name: Fortress Plate
effect: Full-body reinforced ceramite shell. Walking bunker. +40% HP, −15% movement speed. Accept the trade.

name: Frag Grenade Pack
effect: AOE fragmentation grenades. Unlocks aoe:true flag on attacks. Slot locked at Rookie — available after first Veteran promotion.

name: Repair Kit
effect: Battlefield emergency auto-repair module. +2% HP/sec passive regeneration. Stacks with Field Repairs passive (triggers at different thresholds).

name: 'Thumper' Grenade Launcher
effect: AOE explosive, destroys cover. 15m blast radius. Forces enemies out of defensive positions.

name: Magnetic Accelerator (Vehicle)
effect: Hyper-velocity slugs that penetrate multiple targets in a line. The Terran answer to railguns. Unlocked via Branch 4 T4.

name: Spinal MAC Gun (Ship)
effect: Massive forward-only single-shot damage. Snaps capital ships in half. 3-second power diversion to all systems.

name: Repair Drone Beacon
effect: Immediately calls a Field Repair drone to the equipped unit, bypassing normal prioritization queue.

name: Depleted Uranium Rounds
effect: +30% damage vs all targets. Irradiates the hit zone. Premium ammo — expensive but devastating. Unlocked via Branch 1 T3.

name: Hybrid Rounds
effect: Effective vs BOTH Vorax AND Core Guardians. +15% damage against both existential threats. Limited production: 1 set per 5 cycles per factory.

name: TL-99 Marksman Rifle
effect: Semi-auto gauss precision rifle. Integrated targeting scope. +20% accuracy, +15% range. Standard issue for forward observers and fire support teams.

name: Command Uplink
effect: Doubles Commander aura range. Critical for large-scale engagements where coverage over extended frontlines matters.
